strategy.name: IBS Mean Reversion
strategy.description: Internal Bar Strength mean reversion. Buy when close is near the daily low in an uptrend. Pure price-action — no lagging oscillators.

long.description: IBS < 0.2 — closed near the daily low

entry_rules.note: Both conditions required. Long only — buy panic, sell recovery.

exit_rules.description: IBS > 0.8 — closed near the daily high, mean reversion done
